phase_name: ARIS Infernus Nemesis Synthetic Bot Execution Log Gate
summary: INF-BOT-01 creates exactly one synthetic deterministic nemesis execution log from scenario_11_nemesis, records a block verdict for validator_bypass_injection_detected, preserves fixture immutability, updates the validator and tests to require the log and its safety flags, carries forward the INF-MAT-01 final_origin_main_sha warning, and keeps next_phase null.
